context: The response should exercise the `pr-check-triage` Context Specs skill by classifying mixed PR check failures and producing a concise maintainer-ready action summary.

checklist.name: gathers_check_context
checklist.description: Mentions gathering PR status, failing Actions jobs or steps, logs/artifacts, PR SHA, and relevant PR comments before judging the failures.

checklist.name: distinguishes_tessl_from_non_tessl
checklist.description: Correctly separates Tessl governance or skill-assurance failures from Non-Tessl deterministic checks and infrastructure/runtime failures.

checklist.name: identifies_likely_causes
checklist.description: Names likely causes for the sample failures: deterministic assertion, stale or missing review metadata, risk policy human-review requirement, and runner startup timeout.

checklist.name: recommends_rerun_vs_fix
checklist.description: Recommends fixing reproducible deterministic or catalog/Tessl metadata problems, treating risk as a maintainer decision, and rerunning only the runner-timeout infrastructure failure.

checklist.name: uses_concise_summary_format
checklist.description: Produces a compact triage summary with failing checks, likely cause, owner or next action, and rerun-or-fix recommendation.
